name: Clay
description: Clay is an AI-powered platform for scaling personalized outbound and automating GTM workflows, using a table-based workflow builder to enrich, score, and reach out to leads.

auth_methods.note: Clay’s Developers page instructs to create an API key in Clay and authenticate to https://api.clay.com/v1/ using the Authorization header in the form `Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_API_KEY>`.

credential_access.note: The signup page provides a self-serve account creation flow and the API Keys help article documents creating API keys in the dashboard. The help docs do not state that keys require sales or admin approval.

api_surface.note: Clay’s Developers page documents a REST API with base URL `https://api.clay.com/v1/` and lists endpoints for core objects including tables and rows (e.g., `GET /v1/tables`, `POST /v1/tables/{table_id}/rows`, `PATCH /v1/tables/{table_id}/rows/{row_id}`, `DELETE /v1/tables/{table_id}/rows/{row_id}`).

buildability.note: Clay’s public Developers page documents how to create an API key (Settings → API keys), the API base URL, and example REST endpoints; a developer can sign up and begin integrating immediately.
